patch.value: Cross-package hardening item created by Codex on 2026-05-26 Europe/Vienna. Scope: metadata, manifest, package scripts, CI, daily release workflow, pm-changelog integration, and verification evidence.
Align package metadata, pm package manifest, CI, daily release automation, changelog generation, and privacy checks for release readiness.

Package metadata uses current pm CLI/SDK; pm-changelog generates CHANGELOG and release notes; CI and daily release workflows cover GitHub, npm, and Bun-compatible installs; package remains private until full privacy/history checks pass.

value.author: codex
value.text: Package-level pm tracking initialized or reused; duplicate items avoided by title lookup.

value.author: codex
value.text: Created during ecosystem-wide package hardening pass using pm CLI 2026.5.24.

value.author: codex
value.text: Release readiness must be tracked inside each package repo,not only the website companion tracker.
